subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! The thirst hath consumed me. Where is the streams of Thy mercy, O Lord of the worlds? Thy decree hath kept me far [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد اهلکنی ظما قلبی این فرات رحمتک یا اله العالمین و ابعدنی قدرک و
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for nearness to God
